title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Broadcom India Asia Pacific Associates - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Broadcom India Asia Pacific Associates - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Broadcom India Asia Pacific Associates, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Backend Developer for our Gurgaon operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Broadcom India Asia Pacific Associates:
Broadcom India Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Java

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual performance appraisal
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Gurgaon, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Broadcom India Asia Pacific Associates!
